channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Garden of 300 Weedington Road on communal garden side, 22nd May
item.description:
There is a self seeded sycamore tree around 30 years old according to a tree surgeon which is growing in the corner of our garden and looks like it is causing damage to the foundations of the building.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 274-298, Weedington Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street litter, 22nd May
item.description:
Multiple rubbish on the Norman Road. The sweeping team hasn't been here for a long time!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking Daly drive, 22nd May
item.description:
Tree fall down and blocking the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17-24, Withens Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle outside no5 and no7, 22nd May
item.description:
A camper van has been parked for over a week and is untaxed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dene Avenue, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trash cans overflowing, 22nd May
item.description:
There are currently 2 trash cans overflowing on the Lovely lane street. The council hasn't cleaned them for 2 weeks or more now!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd May
item.description:
Continuous fly tipping at bus stop Food/nappies now across pavement ,making it impassable..o/s Sams barbers shop..Immediate clearance required & perpetrators held to account.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Lower Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No road markings., 22nd May
item.description:
The sunnyside road between hazelville Road and Beaumont rise. Where is meets with Beaumont rise the road markings have faded right away. Every morning I drive along Beaumont rise and go up the hill of sunnyside Road. Cars that should be stopping at the smaller sunnyside road to check the road is clear, just pull out. It’s a daily occurrence and my car is black so it’s not like it’s invisible. I believe this is because the road junction line has completely worn down so cars just treat it as one long road. It’s quite ridiculous that this happens every morning on my way to work but then a lot of drivers are quite ridiculous. There should be a stop sign or something. A reassessing of this junction but probably just the white line needs to be re done. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sunnyside Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation overgrown blocking footpath, 22nd May
item.description:
Footpath between Enfield crematorium and hoe lane on A10 southbound completely overgrown. Impossible to use parts of walkway and forced to walk in cycle lane. Extremely dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, Southbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant flytipping in Durfey Place, 22nd May
item.description:
Flytipping in Durfey Place remains a constant issue. I have already raised this within several complaints. It is now happening almost every day, and it continues to have a real impact on residents. Ms Sophia Opoku-Addo, Resident Services Officer for this area, never replied to any emails about the issue and the working group set up by her predecessor. This is simply unacceptable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Edmund Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dump of clothes from 1 Alfearn road, 22nd May
item.description:
Dump of clothes / rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alfearn Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ​Restore Spring Water to Church House Gardens Duck Pond, 22nd May
Tree causing a nuisance, 22nd May
item.description:
Tree is hanging over my roof which is a flat roof so causing damage to roof and flat. Tree hanging over my rear garden causing branches and leaves falling into my garden, after last winter I picked up 9 large bags of leaves and being told by you I would have to pay £3 per bag for you to dispose off. Many large branches have fallen into my garden I am lucky it has not fallen on me or my family. My grandchildren play in that garden. Also at base of tree it is so overgrown it is affecting public right of way. My husband and I are now in our 60 I am a carer for my husband who has terminal cancer and we are finding it difficult to keep on top of garden, it would be a great help if you could come and cut a lot of branches of of the tree so it does not hang over my property. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big chunk of insulation in road, 22nd May
item.description:
Piece of sponge-like building insulation dumped in kerb where Queen Adelaide Rd meets St John's Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Adelaide Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public bin is full, 22nd May
item.description:
Please can the green bin outside Christ Church Central be emptied before the long weekend as it's already full

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Under tree again, 22nd May
item.description:
Woke up to this again, people think it’s ok to dump rubbish here all the time, I think if you put a sign up if caught dumping rubbish you will be fined it could make people think twice about dumping rubbish. Many thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolf Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked bikes again and nothing been done, 22nd May
item.description:
Here is the problem Shoreditch is very quiet and there are too many bikes most of them outside the bay. A lime team member turned up and straightened them out an van turned up and yet here we are a quiet day in the area and yet illegal bikes are cluttering the area… there is no plan and not infrastructure to deal with it even on a quiet day. Either fix it or get off Charlotte rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Charlotte Road, Shoreditch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches, 22nd May
item.description:
I would like to report that the large tree on this road has overgrown branches that are obstructing the street light lamp. As a result, the area becomes very dark at night, making it dangerous for pedestrians and drivers to pass through safely. I kindly request that the branches be trimmed as soon as possible to restore proper lighting and improve safety on the road. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on the footwalk, 22nd May
item.description:
Someone dropped al these items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bird in Bush Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing - needs emptying, 22nd May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Faded road markings, 22nd May
item.description:
Very faded white lines for parking bays, especially hard to see in the dark. Address is 3 Lakefield Close, Penge. SE20 8QQ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
